_meta.comment: Phase 2a sweep landing area-by-area. v1.0.1 adds paywall keys (couples + venue). New keys are additive; value updates on unused stubs are allowed. Existing keys cannot change shape without a major version bump.

Unlock All
Features
paywall.subtitle: One-off purchase. Yours forever.
paywall.feature.playback.title: Full Playback + Live Mode

paywall.feature.live.detail: The panic-proof interface for your venue coordinator. Large controls, zero risk.

paywall.feature.offline.detail: 100% downloaded assurance for venues with no Wi-Fi. Never rely on the network.

restore.failed.title: Could not reach the App Store
restore.failed.message: Your purchase has not been changed. Check your connection and try again.
paywall.disclaimer: One-time payment. No subscriptions. Access forever.
paywall.couple.reuse.disclosure: Includes one wedding. Personalise your names and date as much as you like for your day. Planning ceremonies for multiple couples? That's Wedding Player Pro.
paywall.venue.title: Pro Subscription
paywall.venue.subtitle:
Run multiple weddings from a single device.
Reset and personalise for each new couple.
paywall.venue.feature.fleet.title: Manage multiple weddings
paywall.venue.feature.fleet.detail: Keep every couple saved and switch between bookings in a tap. No rebuilding, nothing lost between weddings.

paywall.venue.feature.playback.title: Full Playback + Live Mode

paywall.venue.feature.future.title: Access to Future Enhancements
paywall.venue.feature.future.detail: Every new feature shipped on the Professional tier is included for the life of your licence.
paywall.pro.trial.headline: Start 1 month free

paywall.pro.disclaimer: Your free month converts to a paid subscription unless cancelled at least 24 hours before it ends. Manage anytime in Settings.

onboarding.demo.body: The demo walks you through a real ceremony: tracks organised into moments, played and managed exactly as you would on the day.
onboarding.demo.tip: Tip cards appear at each stage to explain what to do and why.
onboarding.splash.subtitle: Your Wedding Music deserves more than just a playlist
onboarding.role.title: Welcome to Wedding Player
onboarding.role.body: Whether you're planning your own big day or helping run someone else's, we'll set everything up around you.
onboarding.role.couple.title: I'm planning my own wedding
onboarding.role.couple.body: We'll personalise the app with your names and date so the demo feels like your day.
onboarding.role.pro.title: I'm a wedding professional
onboarding.role.pro.body: Walk through a sample ceremony for Nicola & Alex and see how the reset works between weddings.
onboarding.personalise.title: Make it yours
onboarding.personalise.body: Tell us who's getting married and roughly when. We'll personalise the walkthrough so it reads as your ceremony.
onboarding.personalise.disclaimer: You can change any of this later in Settings.
onboarding.pro.demoComplete.title: That's a run through of a sample ceremony
onboarding.pro.demoComplete.body: Pick how you'd like to set the app up for your first real ceremony.
onboarding.pro.demoComplete.option.reset: Clears the demo couple and tracks. This is the same workflow you'll run between real ceremonies.
Preserves the demo moments + tracks so you can edit your way to your first ceremony instead of starting blank.
onboarding.demoComplete.unlockBlock.stre: No subscription. No renewals. No surprise charges.

demo.complete.title: Demo Complete!
demo.complete.benefit.moments: Separate moments for each part of the ceremony: aisle, signing, and exit.
demo.complete.benefit.playback: Each moment played its tracks in order, with seamless fades to the next moment with a tap.
demo.complete.benefit.advance: Moments advanced automatically. The next one was always cued up and ready.
demo.complete.benefit.edit: Edit the default moments, rename them, or add new ones, including evening moments like drinks and party.
demo.complete.benefit.live: On the day, Live Mode gives you large, easy-to-tap controls. Zero stress.
demo.complete.cta.setup: Start fresh with my own songs
demo.complete.cta.keepDemo: Keep the demo songs to practise
demo.tip.label: TIP
demo.tip.entrance.stopped.context: This is the entrance moment: typically a single, carefully chosen track for the walk down the aisle.
demo.tip.entrance.playing.tip: When the walk is complete, tap Fade Out to cue the next moment.
demo.tip.register.playing.tip: Let the music continue, then tap Fade Out when signing is complete.
demo.tip.register.stopped.action: Tap the big play button above to start the track
demo.tip.register.stopped.context: Background music for signing the register. %d tracks play in sequence, filling however long it takes. You can also turn on Loop Moment to keep playing indefinitely (when the last track finishes, playback wraps back to the first).
demo.tip.register.stopped.tip: Tap Edit Tracks on the moment to turn Loop Moment on.
demo.tip.exit.playing.tip: Let it finish, or tap Fade & End to close the ceremony.
demo.tip.exit.stopped.action: Tap the big play button above to start the track
demo.tip.exit.stopped.context: The exit music: the grand finale as the newlyweds walk back down the aisle.
demo.tip.exit.stopped.tip: Everything is pre-loaded and ready. One tap and the music plays. That's the power of Wedding Player.
demo.tip.default.playing.context: Each moment holds its own playlist, played in order during that part of the day.
demo.tip.default.playing.tip: Let it play to the end, or tap Fade out to move on.
demo.tip.default.stopped.context: Each moment holds its own playlist, played in order during that part of the day.
demo.tip.default.stopped.tip: When it finishes, the next moment is automatically cued up: one tap to start.

You've changed the couple and date several times, so saving this locks them. Your music and ceremony still play perfectly.

Want to set up more couples? Upgrade to Wedding Player Pro. Otherwise tap Keep this wedding, or Cancel to undo.

To set up more couples, upgrade to Wedding Player Pro.

settings.share.row.subtitle: Share with couples, planners, friends
settings.share.sheet.title: Share Wedding Player
settings.share.body: Show the App Store code to install on iPhone and iPad, or scan the website for other ways to download. Share the link with couples you're working with, friends planning their big day, or other event professionals. It works for any cued event, not just weddings.
settings.share.qr.accessibility.appStore: QR code to install Wedding Player from the App Store
settings.share.qr.accessibility.website: QR code to open the Wedding Player website for more ways to download
settings.share.qr.accessibility.googlePl: QR code to install Wedding Player from Google Play
settings.share.email.couple.subject: An app that made our wedding music easy
settings.share.email.couple.body:
One thing that really took the stress out of our wedding day was an app called Wedding Player, so I wanted to pass it on for yours.

You set the day up as moments, like walking down the aisle, the signing, and the first dance, and give each one its own music. It plays each moment on cue with smooth fades, so everything happens right on time without anyone watching a phone.

It is free to download and explore, so you can build your day and see how it works. Unlocking full playback for the day itself is a paid upgrade.

Here is the link: https://weddingplayer.app
settings.share.email.pro.subject: A music solution I recommend to every couple
settings.share.email.pro.body:
Getting the music right is one of the trickiest parts of a smooth wedding day, so I recommend Wedding Player to every couple I work with.

You build the day as moments, like walking down the aisle, the signing, and the first dance, and give each one its own music. The app plays every moment on cue with smooth fades, so each piece begins exactly when it should and the day flows without anyone scrambling for a track.

It is free to download and explore, so you can build the day and see how it works. Unlocking full playback for the day is a paid upgrade.

Take a look here: https://weddingplayer.app
settings.share.email.editor.title: Your recommendation
settings.share.email.editor.footer: This is the email created when you recommend Wedding Player. Make it your own and save it, and that version is used every time. You can edit it again whenever you like.
settings.share.email.editor.subject: Subject
settings.share.email.editor.resetConfirm: This replaces your saved message with the original wording. You can personalise it again at any time.
settings.demo.exit.title: Exit Demo Mode
settings.demo.exit.subtitle: Clear all demo tracks and start building your own ceremony playlist.
settings.beta.title: Beta Testing Guide
settings.beta.subtitle: Step-by-step walkthrough of every feature, what to test, and how to send feedback.
settings.resetPurchase.title: Reset Purchase State
settings.resetPurchase.subtitle: Clear the local purchase flag so you can test the purchase flow again.
alert.reset.title: Set Up for New Wedding
alert.reset.message:
This will permanently delete all couple names, wedding date, tracks, playlists, and custom moments. Your theme, purchase status, and app settings will be kept.

This cannot be undone.
alert.exitDemo.title: Exit Demo Mode
alert.exitDemo.message: This will remove all demo tracks and let you start building your own ceremony playlist from scratch.
alert.resetPurchase.title: Reset Purchase
alert.resetPurchase.message: This clears the local purchase flag. You'll still need to manage the sandbox transaction in Settings → App Store → Sandbox Account to fully re-test purchasing.

music.title: Apple Music
music.access.title: Apple Music Access
music.access.body: Wedding Player needs access to Apple Music to search and add tracks to your moments.
music.access.denied.title: Access Denied
music.access.denied.body: Apple Music access was denied. You can enable it in Settings > Privacy & Security > Media & Apple Music.
music.access.denied.fallback: You can still import local audio files using the Add Music button.
music.subscription.title: Apple Music Subscription Required
music.subscription.body: An active Apple Music subscription is needed to add tracks from the Apple Music catalog.
music.subscription.fallback: You don't need a subscription. Use Wedding Player Originals (curated ceremony tracks) or your own local audio files.
music.search.idle.title: Find your ceremony music
music.search.idle.body: Tap on the search bar above or select one of the options below.
music.library.empty: No playlists found in your library
music.similar.title: Similar to "%@"
catalogue.title: Wedding Player Originals
catalogue.tip: Tap to select tracks to add to this moment. Pick as many as you like, then tap Add at the bottom.
catalogue.empty.title: No Originals downloaded yet
catalogue.empty.body: Wedding Player Originals are %d free ceremony-ready tracks (Prelude, Processional, Signing, Recessional). Download the ones you like over Wi-Fi, then add them to any moment.
appleMusicGuide.warning.title: Important: Offline Downloads
appleMusicGuide.warning.body: Apple Music tracks need to be downloaded to your device before the ceremony. Without downloads, they won't play if the venue has no WiFi.
appleMusicGuide.step1.title: Sync Library
appleMusicGuide.step1.detail: Go to Settings → Music → Sync Library and make sure it's ON. This allows Apple Music tracks to be downloaded.
appleMusicGuide.step2.title: Automatic Downloads
appleMusicGuide.step2.detail: In Settings → Music, enable Automatic Downloads. New tracks added to your library will download automatically.
appleMusicGuide.step3.title: Verify Before the Day
appleMusicGuide.step3.detail: Use the Offline Checklist in Wedding Player to confirm every track is downloaded. Do this the night before, don't rely on venue WiFi.
appleMusicGuide.step4.title: Bluetooth Reliability
appleMusicGuide.step4.detail: If a Bluetooth speaker disconnects mid-ceremony, local tracks will continue on your phone's speaker. Apple Music tracks may stop: Apple's streaming framework doesn't survive route changes. For critical moments, a wired connection or local audio files are the most reliable.
downloads.title: Offline Readiness
downloads.allClear.title: All Clear
downloads.allClear.body: All your tracks are stored on this device: they'll work offline with no issues.
downloads.instructions.title: Download in Apple Music
downloads.instructions.intro: Wedding Player cannot download Apple Music tracks for you, so the last step happens in Apple Music itself.
downloads.instructions.step4: Tap the download icon to get every track in one go.
downloads.instructions.footer: Come back here when you are done and pull down to refresh.
downloads.instructions.expectedCount: Your ceremony has %d Apple Music tracks, so the playlist should list that many. If Apple Music shows fewer, pull down to refresh it, give iCloud a moment, then download any that are still missing from the list on this screen.
downloads.instructions.expectedCountPart: Your ceremony playlist holds %d Apple Music tracks. Some of your tracks could not be added to it. See the list higher up this screen to fix those in Apple Music.
playback.amStartFailed.skipping: "%@" would not start from Apple Music. Skipped to the next track.
playback.amStartFailed.terminal: "%@" would not start from Apple Music.
playback.amStartFailed.terminal.action: Nothing else is queued in this moment. Tap play to try again, or swipe to another moment.
transport.a11y.starting: Starting the track. Waiting for Apple Music.
downloads.playlistSync.title: Some songs are not in the playlist
downloads.playlistSync.body: Wedding Player could not add these to the ceremony playlist, so downloading the playlist will not cover them:
downloads.playlistSync.fix: Download these individually in Apple Music, or remove and re-add them in Wedding Player.
downloads.offlineVerify.title: You are offline
downloads.offlineVerify.body: Reconnect to the internet to verify your Apple Music tracks are in the ceremony playlist. Nothing has changed while you are offline.
downloads.verify: TAP OR PULL DOWN TO REFRESH
downloads.tip.heading: Download all your tracks the night before.
downloads.tip.body: Tap **DOWNLOAD** on any track to open Apple Music, then download your ceremony playlist from Library. Come back here and pull down to refresh.

setupGuide.title: GET STARTED
setupGuide.intro.title: How Wedding Player works
setupGuide.intro.detail: Create a moment for each part of your ceremony, then add music tracks to each one. Once organised, you can tap on the big play button to start the playback, and tap it again to fade out the music at the right time. The next moment lines up automatically, ready to be played when you are ready.
setupGuide.tips.title: Tip cards on every screen
setupGuide.tips.body.prefix: You can access detailed help on all aspects of Wedding Player by tapping on the
setupGuide.tips.body.suffix: at the top of most screens.
setupGuide.darkMode.title: Dark Mode
setupGuide.darkMode.body.prefix: You can switch back to Light or System Mode via the Settings menu
setupGuide.textSize.title: Larger Text
setupGuide.textSize.body.prefix: Prefer bigger text? Open the Settings menu
setupGuide.textSize.body.suffix: and turn on Custom Text Size to scale the type throughout the app.
predemo.couple.title: Your big day. Your music.
predemo.couple.body:
You've spent weeks picking the perfect tracks for each moment: walking down the aisle, signing the register, and your exit.

On the day, you'll hand the phone to a friend and hope they don't fumble it or the venue Wi-Fi cuts out.

Everything saves to your iCloud automatically, so your ceremony is ready on any of your devices: prepare on your iPhone, run it from your iPad.

Wedding Player works offline and guides them through every cue. It's about to guide you through this short demo the same way.
predemo.couple.tipCardsNote: You'll see tip cards along the way explaining what's happening. In Live Mode on the day, those cards disappear so the screen stays clean for whoever's running it.
predemo.pro.title: Every ceremony, exactly to plan.
predemo.pro.body:
You've coordinated dozens of weddings. The music is the one thing nobody notices when it's right and everyone hears when it's wrong.

Wedding Player runs each cue in order, fades cleanly between moments, and never needs your attention mid-ceremony. Tap the button below to run through a sample ceremony.
predemo.pro.tipCardsNote: The sample ceremony shows tip cards as it plays so you know what each control does. In Live Mode at a real ceremony they're hidden. Just the controls you need, nothing else on screen.
iPad.tipCard.title: ADD YOUR MUSIC
iPad.editMode.title: %@ Playlist
getMusic.hint.step1: Tap the **play circle** to hear a 15-second preview.
getMusic.hint.step2: Tap the **download arrow** to save the full track, then play again to hear the whole thing.
getMusic.hint.step3: Tap **Done**: your downloaded Originals will be available to add to your Moments.
downloads.readiness.message.actionNeeded: Action needed: most tracks need downloading
downloads.action.bullet2: A **"%@"** playlist has been created in Apple Music
downloads.action.bullet3: In Apple Music, open Library, then Playlists, and tap the download icon on that playlist

missingTracks.title: Missing Tracks
missingTracks.empty.title: All missing tracks resolved
missingTracks.empty.body: Nothing left to fix here. Your ceremony is ready.
missingTracks.header.title: Not on this device
missingTracks.header.body: These tracks are still on your ceremony plan but their audio isn't on this device. If you added them on another device they won't be here yet; otherwise re-import them, or remove the track from the moment.
missingTracks.hint.localFile: If you added this track on another device, its audio isn't available here yet. To add it on this device, open the moment, tap Edit Tracks, then Add Local Files. Or remove the row below if you no longer need this track.
missingTracks.hint.original: This Wedding Player Original is no longer available on this device and the catalogue can't redownload it right now. Remove it from the moment, or check back later when your device is online.
downloads.integrity.title: Track files missing
downloads.integrity.body: These tracks are added to your ceremony but their audio files are missing from this device. They will not play in Live Mode until restored.
downloads.integrity.fix.localFiles: How to fix: re-import the file via Add Local Files in the affected moment.
downloads.integrity.fix.originals: How to fix: open the affected moment and tap the track to redownload from the catalogue.
preCeremony.subtitle.default: A few quick checks before going Live.
preCeremony.subtitle.complete: Tap Go Live when you're set.
preCeremony.subtitle.almost.singular: Your checklist is done. One track above still needs downloading.
preCeremony.subtitle.almost.plural: Your checklist is done. %d tracks above still need downloading.
preCeremony.subtitle.attention: Sort the flagged item below before you go live.
preCeremony.checklist.title: Operator checklist
preCeremony.checklist.intro: Tap the circles to confirm, then tap Go Live. The rest is checked for you.
preCeremony.row.airplane.title: Is Airplane Mode on?
preCeremony.row.airplane.helper: Swipe down from the top-right edge to open Control Centre, then tap the airplane icon.
preCeremony.row.dnd.title: Is Do Not Disturb on? - Manual Check
preCeremony.row.dnd.helper: Swipe down from the top-right edge to open Control Centre, then tap and hold the Focus tile and pick Do Not Disturb.
preCeremony.row.audio.title: Is the audio system connected and tested?
preCeremony.row.battery.title: Is the battery charging or above 30%%?
preCeremony.amNotDownloaded.body: Open Apple Music, go to Library → Playlists, find "%@", and tap the download arrow to redownload.
preCeremony.warning.activeSegmentEmpty.d: The active segment has no moments with tracks. Add tracks to at least one moment before going Live.
preCeremony.warning.momentEmpty.title: "%@" has no tracks
preCeremony.warning.momentEmpty.detail: Live Mode will skip this moment.
preCeremony.warning.localTrackMissing.de: The audio for this track isn't on this device. If you added it on another device it won't be here yet; otherwise re-add it before going Live.
preCeremony.warning.amNotAuthorized.deta: Wedding Player needs Apple Music access to play your subscription tracks. Grant access in Settings.
preCeremony.warning.batteryLow.title: Battery low (%d%%)
preCeremony.warning.batteryLow.detail: Connect to power before the ceremony so the device doesn't shut down mid-playback.
